final_message.content: The document focuses on reusable tooling, OCR quality, and automation priorities.

content.content:
Project Atlas is a lightweight document intelligence initiative.
The first milestone is building a reusable agent toolkit for file exploration.
The second milestone is adding tool-based analysis and structured outputs.
Risks: inconsistent file naming and missing metadata.
Priority topics: compliance, OCR quality, automation.
content.name: read_text_file

all_messages.content: The document focuses on reusable tooling, OCR quality, and automation priorities.
